title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
